entities.name: Order
entities.description: A customer order moving through checkout.

operations.name: List Orders
operations.description: Lists orders. #185 fixture: a second Order operation whose path is a BARE entity word — dilutes 'orders' document-frequency across the corpus so it stays a specific (not ubiquitous) word, contrasting with the 'providers' entity below.

entities.name: Provider
entities.description: #185 fixture: a deliberately common entity — nearly every operation below shares the bare word 'providers', mirroring the real dogeared-coach over-match (an 'auth-provider.tsx' file lexically matched ~30 unrelated provider operations). Regression fixture for CTR-fh-050/051/INV-fh-012: 'providers' alone must NOT bind, but an entity+verb combination (e.g. 'verify') still does.

operations.name: List Providers
operations.description: Bare entity word only — the over-match case.

operations.name: Verify Provider
operations.description: Entity + specific verb — must still bind for a file whose path also contains 'verify'.

operations.name: Schedule Provider
operations.description: Entity + a different specific word — keeps 'providers' from being the corpus's only word.
